titleStmt.title: SII 15.170: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 170. (B.K. No. 96 of 1926-27.) MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Andānasvāmi Maṭha.
This is dated the 15th regnal year of the king, Tāraṇa, Pushya śu. 14, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa corresponding to 1224 A.D., December 25, Wednesday, f.d.t. °45.
The inscription records that Adhikāri Nāgarasa made a gift of land to the god Svayambhudēva, after washing the feet of the teacher Siddhānti-vādi-Sōmēśvara for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namaḥśaśikaḷākōṭikalpamānāṁtara śriyē saṁkaḷpa
kaḷpavijñāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrīmatu ya(yā)davanārāya
yaṇa bhujabaḷa pratāpacakravartti śrī siṁgaṇadēva
varṣada 15 neya tāraṇa saṁvatsarada puṣya suddha caturddaśi budhavā
ra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti parvvadaṁdu śrī svayaṁbhudēva
ra naṁdādīvigeyācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍavantāgi śrī suraḷōkacakra
vartti siddhāṁti vādi sōmōśvara dēvara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ māḍi svayaṁ
bhudēvare teḷavriti mukhyanāgi haḷḷigaḷenisoḷavaniga
soraṭūra maṁneyada havūramaṁ sarbbābādhaparihāravā
gi naḍavaṁtāgi yadhikāri nāgarasa dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa
niṁtī dharmmamaṁ pāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi prayūge kurukṣē
tradoḷu sāvira kavileyaṁ sadakṣiṇe sahita vēdapāraga
rappa sabrāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phaḷamakku Īdanaḷidātanābrāhmaṇa
kavileyumaṁ kurukṣētradoḷu svahastadinaḷida pāta
kanaku gaṁgāsāgareyamunāsaṁgamadoḷu kōṭi kavile
yaṁ bāhmaṇaraṁ liṁgigaḷaṁ sale puṇyadinaṁgaḷoḷaḷidavargga
ḷappariṁtidanaḷidarū .
Digital edition of SII 15.170 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
